steps.title: Use the colon for elaboration
steps.content: The clause "a team tried something new" is complete. The phrase after the blank explains what the new method was: sequencing DNA from fossilized dental plaque.

steps.title: Introduce the method
steps.content: Choice B uses a semicolon before a phrase that is not an independent clause. Choice C places the colon after "sequencing," where the preceding wording is incomplete. Choice D turns the method phrase into a sentence fragment. A colon correctly introduces the explanation. The answer is A.
